name: frontend-code-review
description: Framework-agnostic frontend code review for UI, components, design systems, data/query boundaries, accessibility, performance, and tests.

interface.shortDescription: Review frontend changes for UI, behavior, and accessibility risks
interface.longDescription: Structured frontend review guidance for component architecture, design-system usage, accessibility, data/query contracts, performance, and testing. Works across React, Vue, and Next.js/Nuxt projects.
defaultPrompt: Audit this UI implementation for behavior, accessibility, and responsive issues.
